title: AI Engineer
company_focus: AI solutions for environmental and industrial applications
description:
Unlock Your Future with Nexaminds!

At Nexaminds, we're on a mission to redefine industries with
AI. We're passionate about the limitless potential of
artificial intelligence to transform businesses, streamline
processes, and drive growth.

Join us on our visionary journey. We're leading the way in
AI solutions, and we're committed to innovation,
collaboration, and ethical practices. Become a part of our
team and shape the future powered by intelligent machines.
If you're driven by ambition, success, fun, and learning,
Nexaminds is where you belong.

Nexaminds is looking for an AI Engineer to develop, deploy,
and optimize machine learning models focused on real-world
environmental and industrial applications. The ideal
candidate has experience in deep learning, computer vision,
and end-to-end model lifecycle, and enjoys working at the
intersection of AI and robotics in fast-paced environments.

Location: India

Qualifications we are looking for:

- 2+ years of experience building and deploying machine
  learning models
- Strong proficiency in Python
- Experience with deep learning frameworks (PyTorch,
  TensorFlow)
- Solid understanding of computer vision fundamentals (OpenCV)
- Experience with real-time object detection and
  classification
- Knowledge of full ML lifecycle (data curation, training,
  deployment, monitoring)
- Experience optimizing models for edge computing environments
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in dynamic
  environments
- Strong written and verbal English proficiency

Nice to Have:

- Experience with Nvidia Jetson or TensorRT optimization
- Familiarity with MLOps tools (Weights & Biases)
- Experience with ROS (Robot Operating System) or AI +
  robotics integration

Job duties:

- Develop and optimize deep learning models for real-time
  object detection and classification
- Integrate AI models into systems and ensure seamless
  interaction with hardware and software
- Collaborate with robotics and software engineering teams
- Test and validate models in real-world, unstructured
  environments
- Monitor model performance in production and handle model
  drift with retraining strategies
- Optimize models for low-latency inference on edge/on-site
  hardware
- Support data collection and model calibration when needed

What you can expect from us

Here at Nexaminds, we're not your typical workplace. We're
all about creating a friendly and trusting environment where
you can thrive. Why does this matter? Well, trust and
openness lead to better quality, innovation, commitment to
getting the job done, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness.

- Stock options 📈
- Remote work options 🏠
- Flexible working hours 🕜
- Benefits above the law
- But it's not just about the work; it's about the people too.
  You'll be collaborating with some seriously awesome IT
  pros.
- You'll have access to mentorship and tons of opportunities
  to learn and level up.

Ready to embark on this journey with us? 🚀🎉 If you're
feeling the excitement, go ahead and apply!
responsibilities: Develop and optimize deep learning models for real-time object detection and classification
Integrate AI models into systems for seamless interaction with hardware and software
Collaborate with robotics and software engineering teams
Test and validate models in real-world, unstructured environments
Monitor model performance in production and handle model drift with retraining strategies
Optimize models for low-latency inference on edge and on-site hardware
Support data collection and model calibration when needed
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role focuses on traditional ML/DL work including
computer vision, object detection, and edge deployment.
There's no mention of LLMs, agents, RAG, or other GenAI
technologies - it's primarily about deep learning models for
visual tasks in robotics/industrial settings.
